_meta.notes: Entry requirements verified against official UMT Prospektus 2026 (April edition)

preuniversity.label: Asasi / Matrikulasi / STPM
preuniversity.description: You've completed or are completing your pre-university studies.
preuniversity.descriptionBM: Anda telah atau sedang menamatkan pengajian pra-universiti.

highschool.label: SPM / O-Level
highschool.description: You've completed SPM and are deciding your next step.
highschool.descriptionBM: Anda baru menamatkan SPM dan sedang memilih laluan seterusnya.

programs.name: Asasi STEM
programs.nameBM: Asasi STEM
programs.faculty: Pusat Asasi STEM
programs.description: The first STEM Foundation program in Malaysia at UMT. Designed to prepare students with solid knowledge and skills in science, technology, engineering and mathematics before entering degree programs. Covers Biology, Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and introductory programming.
programs.descriptionBM: Program Asasi STEM pertama di Malaysia di UMT. Menyediakan pelajar dengan pengetahuan kukuh dalam sains, teknologi, kejuruteraan dan matematik sebelum memasuki program ijazah.
careers: Pathway to any UMT Science/Tech Degree
careersBM: Laluan ke mana-mana Ijazah Sains/Teknologi UMT

contact.name: Prof. Madya Dr. Laili binti Haji Che Rose

entry.summary: 5 credits in SPM including BM; Grade B in Mathematics/Add Maths; Grade C+ in 3 Science subjects
entry.summaryBM: 5 kepujian SPM termasuk BM; Gred B dalam Matematik/Matematik Tambahan; Gred C+ dalam 3 mata pelajaran Sains
entry.scienceRequirement: Grade C+ in at least 3 of: Biology, Physics, Chemistry OR Grade C+ in 2 Science subjects + Grade C+ in 1 technical/elective subject
entry.mathRequirement: Grade B in Mathematics or Additional Mathematics
entry.international: Minimum Grade C in 5 O-Level subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry
entry.english: Minimum Band 3.5 MUET / Band 5 IELTS / 35-45 TOEFL

programs.name: Diploma in Fisheries
programs.nameBM: Diploma Perikanan
programs.faculty: Faculty of Fisheries Sciences and Aquaculture
programs.description: A foundational diploma in the fisheries sector. Trains students in fisheries science, aquaculture, fisheries management, and aquatic product processing. Graduates can enter the workforce or continue to a degree program at UMT or other universities.
programs.descriptionBM: Diploma asas dalam sektor perikanan. Melatih pelajar dalam sains perikanan, akuakultur, pengurusan perikanan, dan pemprosesan produk akuatik. Graduan boleh bekerja atau menyambung ke peringkat ijazah.

contact.name: Dr. Mohd Fazrul Hisam bin Abd Aziz

entry.summary: 3 credits in SPM including BM; Grade C in Mathematics; Grade E in English; Grade A in Science OR credits in Science electives
entry.summaryBM: 3 kepujian SPM termasuk BM; Gred C dalam Matematik; Gred E dalam Bahasa Inggeris; Gred A dalam Sains ATAU kredit dalam elektif Sains
entry.scienceRequirement: Grade A in Sains OR Grade C in Chemistry/Physics/Biology + 2 other subjects

programs.name: Bachelor of Computer Science (Software Engineering) with Honours
programs.nameBM: Sarjana Muda Sains Komputer (Kejuruteraan Perisian) dengan Kepujian
programs.faculty: Faculty of Computer Science and Mathematics
programs.description: Master the art of building software systems. Covers software design, algorithms, databases, mobile and web development, and project management.
programs.descriptionBM: Kuasai seni membina sistem perisian. Merangkumi reka bentuk perisian, algoritma, pangkalan data, dan pembangunan aplikasi.

entry.stpm: Grade C in Mathematics T or Physics at STPM
entry.matrikulasi: Pass with CGPA ≥ 2.00; credits in Mathematics or Physics
entry.asasi: Pass UMT Asasi STEM or equivalent with CGPA ≥ 2.00

spmBase.note: 5A in SPM — very competitive, Asasi recommended

entry.summaryBM: STPM: Gred C dalam Matematik T atau Fizik | Matrikulasi/Asasi: PNGK ≥ 2.00 dengan Matematik/Fizik
